product_visual_description: Occhiali da sole smart in stile wayfarer classico, montatura bianca lucida in ABS/policarbonato con lenti scure grigio-nero. Le aste sono bianche con terminazioni grigio-argento metalliche dove sono integrati gli speaker e i controlli touch. La montatura presenta una forma rettangolare leggermente arrotondata, con naselli in silicone intercambiabili. Le cerniere sono in acciaio inossidabile lucido. Sul lato destro dell'asta si nota un piccolo logo circolare inciso. Il prodotto è accompagnato nella foto reference da una mano che regge uno smartphone con schermo colorato. Design moderno, elegante e unisex. Colore dominante: bianco #FFFFFF con accenti grigio #9E9E9E e nero #1A1A1A sulle lenti.
global_rule:
GLOBAL RULE — APPLIES TO ALL 10 IMAGES:
This is a PHOTO EDITING task, not a product generation task.
You are working with the uploaded reference photos of the Occhiali Smart Bluetooth Wayfarer Bianchi.
THE PRODUCT MUST BE TAKEN PIXEL-PERFECT FROM THE REFERENCE PHOTOS.
Do not redraw it. Do not reinterpret it. Do not simplify it.
Treat it as a photographic cutout — only backgrounds and surrounding graphic elements change.

THE PRODUCT IS UNTOUCHABLE.
Do NOT alter its shape. Do NOT change its proportions.
Do NOT modify its colors. Do NOT add glow or effects ON it.
Do NOT blend it with the background.
If any effect touches the product — that is a FAILURE.

IGNORE ANY BRAND NAME OR LOGO IN THE REFERENCE PRODUCT PHOTO.
LOGO MODE FOR THIS JOB: LOGO_PROVIDED
- For images 02, 04, 06, 09: integrate the brand logo (SECOND image_input) in the BOTTOM-RIGHT corner following LOGO INTEGRATION RULES.
- For images 01a, 01b, 03, 05, 07, 08: behave exactly as NO_LOGO — do NOT add any logo, brand name, watermark, or placeholder. Do NOT leave empty space reserved for a logo.
NEVER write the text 'LOGO', 'BRAND', 'PLACEHOLDER', or similar AS TEXT in the image.

ALL TEXT IN IMAGES MUST BE IN ITALIAN.
Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG.
Font: modern bold sans-serif.

images.name: Hero Sfondo Bianco
images.prompt:
GLOBAL RULE — APPLIES TO ALL 10 IMAGES:
This is a PHOTO EDITING task, not a product generation task.
You are working with the uploaded reference photos of the Occhiali Smart Bluetooth Wayfarer Bianchi.
THE PRODUCT MUST BE TAKEN PIXEL-PERFECT FROM THE REFERENCE PHOTOS.
Do not redraw it. Do not reinterpret it. Do not simplify it.
Treat it as a photographic cutout — only backgrounds and surrounding graphic elements change.
THE PRODUCT IS UNTOUCHABLE. Do NOT alter its shape, proportions, colors. Do NOT add glow or effects ON it. Do NOT blend it with the background. If any effect touches the product — FAILURE.
IGNORE ANY BRAND NAME OR LOGO IN THE REFERENCE PRODUCT PHOTO.
LOGO MODE: NO_LOGO for this image. DO NOT add any logo, brand name, watermark, or placeholder. DO NOT leave empty space reserved for a logo. Fill the full composition.
NEVER write 'LOGO', 'BRAND', 'PLACEHOLDER' in the image.
ALL TEXT IN IMAGES MUST BE IN ITALIAN.
Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG. Font: modern bold sans-serif.

IMAGE 01A — HERO SFONDO BIANCO:
STEP 1 — RENDER THE PRODUCT EXACTLY AS IN THE REFERENCE PHOTOS:
Extract ONLY the sunglasses (the wayfarer-style smart glasses with white frame and dark lenses) as a pixel-perfect photographic cutout. Ignore the hand holding the smartphone — use only the glasses.
Position them centered horizontally and vertically on the canvas, large and prominent, filling approximately 75% of the canvas width. Slight 3/4 angle as shown in the reference. Product must look exactly as photographed — white glossy frame, dark gray-black lenses, silver-gray temples with integrated speakers, stainless steel hinges.
STEP 2 — PURE WHITE BACKGROUND:
Background: pure white RGB(255,255,255). No gradients, no shadows, no textures. No text. No logos. No watermarks. No effects of any kind. Clean Amazon main image standard. Drop shadow beneath the glasses: extremely subtle, soft, gray shadow at 8% opacity only on the ground plane — absolutely does NOT touch the product itself.

NEGATIVE PROMPT: No redrawn product. No illustrated style. No glow on product. No colored background. No text. No logo. No placeholder. No smartphone in the scene.

images.name: Hero Con Effetto
images.prompt:
GLOBAL RULE — APPLIES TO ALL 10 IMAGES:
This is a PHOTO EDITING task, not a product generation task.

THE PRODUCT MUST BE TAKEN PIXEL-PERFECT FROM THE REFERENCE PHOTOS.
Do not redraw it. Do not reinterpret it. Do not simplify it.
Treat it as a photographic cutout — only backgrounds and surrounding graphic elements change.
THE PRODUCT IS UNTOUCHABLE. Do NOT alter its shape, proportions, colors. Do NOT add glow or effects ON it. Do NOT blend it with the background. If any effect touches the product — FAILURE.
IGNORE ANY BRAND NAME OR LOGO IN THE REFERENCE PRODUCT PHOTO.
LOGO MODE: NO_LOGO for this image. Fill the full composition with visual content.
NEVER write 'LOGO', 'BRAND', 'PLACEHOLDER' in the image.
ALL TEXT IN IMAGES MUST BE IN ITALIAN.
Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG. Font: modern bold sans-serif.

IMAGE 01B — HERO CON EFFETTO SONIC BURST:

STEP 1 — RENDER THE PRODUCT EXACTLY AS IN THE REFERENCE PHOTOS:
Extract ONLY the smart sunglasses (wayfarer style, white frame #FFFFFF, dark lenses #1A1A1A, gray-silver temples) as a pixel-perfect photographic cutout. Ignore the hand and smartphone.
Place the glasses centered horizontally, vertically centered slightly above midpoint (55% from top), large and dominant — approximately 70% of canvas width. Maintain exact angle from reference (slight 3/4 perspective). The product is on a SEPARATE untouched layer. THE PRODUCT IS UNTOUCHABLE — no effects, no glow, no color shift, no blur on the product itself.

STEP 2 — ADD BACKGROUND EFFECT ONLY BEHIND THE PRODUCT:
Background base: deep navy-black gradient #050A18 to #0D1B3E, radial, center bright.
ONLY in the area BEHIND and AROUND the product — NOT touching, NOT overlapping the glasses:
- Explosive sonic burst: multiple concentric audio wave arcs radiating outward from behind the glasses center, rendered in electric cyan #00C6FF and soft white #E8F8FF, varying thickness (thick near center, thin at edges), 40-60% opacity.
- Bluetooth symbol: large, faint #00C6FF Bluetooth icon centered behind the glasses at 15% opacity, massive scale.
- Prismatic light rays: 8 radial light beams in white-to-cyan gradient at 25% opacity, spreading from center.
- Floating music note icons (♪ ♫) in #00C6FF at 30% opacity, scattered asymmetrically around the glasses at various scales.
- Fine particle scatter: tiny white and cyan dots at 20% opacity across the dark background.
- NO effect bleeds onto the product. Hard mask edge around the glasses.
NO text. NO logos. NO watermarks. NO empty reserved space.

NEGATIVE PROMPT: No effects ON the product. No glow touching the glasses. No text. No logo. No redrawn glasses. No cartoon style.

images.prompt:
GLOBAL RULE — APPLIES TO ALL 10 IMAGES:

LOGO MODE: LOGO_PROVIDED — integrate logo (SECOND image_input) bottom-right corner only.
NEVER write 'LOGO', 'BRAND', 'PLACEHOLDER' in the image.
ALL TEXT IN IMAGES MUST BE IN ITALIAN.
Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG. Font: modern bold sans-serif.

IMAGE 02 — BENEFIT PRINCIPALE:
Background: deep dark gradient from #080F1F (top-left) to #0D2040 (bottom-right). Subtle geometric circuit-board pattern overlay in #00C6FF at 4% opacity covering the full background.
LEFT 55% of canvas: product cutout of the smart sunglasses (pixel-perfect from reference, only the glasses, no smartphone). Placed vertically centered, large, showing the full front/3/4 view. Slight soft drop shadow behind the glasses (behind only, not on). No effects on the product.
RIGHT 45% of canvas: vertical list of 5 benefit lines in ITALIAN, vertically centered in this zone:
  TOP HEADER (right zone): Bold white text, size ~48px: 'I TUOI OCCHIALI SMART'
  Thin horizontal #00C6FF separator line below header.
  5 benefit lines with #00C6FF checkmark icon (✓) left of each line:
  ✓ 'Audio Bluetooth 5.0 cristallino'
  ✓ 'Controllo touch sulle aste'
  ✓ 'Fino a 7 ore di autonomia'
  ✓ 'Resistente a schizzi d\'acqua'
  ✓ 'Ricarica rapida in 60 minuti'
  Each line: checkmark in #00C6FF bold, text in white bold ~36px. Thin #1A2F5A separator between each line. Generous spacing.
Fill the entire canvas with content — no empty corner reserved for anything except the logo placement area (bottom-right).
BOTTOM of right zone: thin #00C6FF line, then small text in #00C6FF ~24px: 'BLUETOOTH · MUSICA · CHIAMATE'

LOGO PLACEMENT: Integrate the brand logo (provided as the SECOND reference image) in the BOTTOM-RIGHT corner of the final image. Logo width: approximately 12-15% of the image width. Padding: about 4% from the right edge and 4% from the bottom edge. The logo must be clearly visible and legible. If the background behind the logo has a similar tone to the logo colors, add a subtle contrast enhancement (soft drop shadow OR a very faint white backdrop card at 10-20% opacity) to ensure readability. The logo is a brand marker: do NOT distort it, do NOT tilt it, do NOT let other elements cover it. Preserve the EXACT colors and proportions of the original logo. Do NOT add any text label next to the logo. This logo is the CLIENT brand identity (distinct from 'No supplier brand names or logos' in the negative prompt, which refers only to manufacturer marks visible on the product).

NEGATIVE PROMPT: No redrawn product. No illustrated style. No glow on product. No English text. No supplier logo. No placeholder.

IMAGE 03 — SPECIFICHE TECNICHE · CONNETTIVITÀ E AUDIO:
Background: clean light warm gray gradient #F2F2F0 (top) to #E8E8E4 (bottom). Subtle diagonal thin lines pattern in #CCCCCC at 6% opacity. Crisp, premium, editorial feel.

LAYOUT — 2 columns separated by thin #00C6FF vertical line:

RIGHT COLUMN (55% width), vertically centered, 4 spec cards stacked:
  Each card: dark #0D1B3E rounded rectangle, padding 24px, 8px border-radius.
  Card 1: icon (Bluetooth symbol in #00C6FF) | bold white: 'BLUETOOTH 5.0' | small gray: 'Portata fino a 10 metri'
  Card 2: icon (headphone in #00C6FF) | bold white: 'AUDIO STEREO HD' | small gray: 'Altoparlanti integrati nelle aste'
  Card 3: icon (microphone in #00C6FF) | bold white: 'MICROFONO IN SILICONE' | small gray: 'Chiamate chiare e nitide'
  Card 4: icon (water drop in #00C6FF) | bold white: 'RESISTENZA IP4' | small gray: 'Protetto da schizzi d\'acqua'
BOTTOM CENTER: bold #0D1B3E text ~32px on light background: 'QUALITÀ AUDIO PROFESSIONALE IN UN PAIO DI OCCHIALI'
Fill canvas completely. No empty corners.

NEGATIVE PROMPT: No redrawn product. No glow on product. No English text. No logo. No placeholder. No dark background (this image must be LIGHT).

IMAGE 07 — LIFESTYLE:
Show a stylish woman, age 25-35, with a confident and relaxed expression, wearing the smart sunglasses (pixel-perfect photographic cutout from reference placed ON her face realistically — proper perspective, proper scale matching face size, natural nose-bridge fit). She is in an urban outdoor environment: a bright city street or rooftop terrace on a sunny day, golden hour light from the left. She has one earbud area near her temple with the glasses resting naturally on her face. Expression: genuine smile, looking slightly off-camera, relaxed and confident.
Environment: sun-drenched city backdrop, soft bokeh buildings and warm golden light, shallow depth of field. Natural photography feel — not staged, not stock photo cliché.
The glasses on her face are the EXACT cutout from the reference: white frame, dark lenses, silver temples. They sit naturally on her nose. Do NOT redraw the glasses. Do NOT illustrate them. They are the photographed product placed into the scene.
Mood: modern, aspirational, fashionable, tech-savvy.
NO text overlays. NO logo space. NO graphic elements. Pure editorial lifestyle photography feel.
Full canvas filled with the photographic composition.

NEGATIVE PROMPT: No text. No logo. No placeholder. No graphic overlay. No redrawn glasses. No cartoon style. No studio background. No white background.
